since_last: 55% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.09%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC +0.30% · Gold +1.26% · Nasdaq100 +0.37%. 55% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.09%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.09%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: VRT is the standout at +7.73%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.73%, ARM +7.42%, AMAT +7.34%, ASML +6.26%, MRVL +6.17%. Laggards: APP -4.03%, SNAP -4.03%, AI -3.34%, META -3.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.82% at $198.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
